creator: robin.haberkorn@googlemail.com
text:
(In reply to Robin Haberkorn from comment #3)

But perhaps rodrigo@FreeBSD.org could speak out regarding WITH_LTO and BINMODE before I change anything.

BINMODE was 555 on BSD for ages:
https://unix.stackexchange.com/posts/340298/revisions
But there seems to be no security reason for this.
